data.title: Gate.io has launched AQA spot trading and started Launchpool staking mining
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io has launched AQA spot trading at 19:00 (UTC+8) on April 16, and opened AQA staking mining from 19:00 on April 16 to 19:00 on April 23 (UTC+8). Staking USDT and AQA to participate in Launchpool can share 5,000,000 AQA for free. Among them, the AQA mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 260.71%, and the USDT new user pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 104.29%.

This KiloEX incident reminds us that in the Wild West of Web3, even promising platforms can get caught with their pants down. data.title: BTC/USDT,ETH/USDT and SOL/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Futures data, over the past 24 hours, the BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, SOL/USDT, OM/USDT and XRP/USDT trading pairs led the USD-M perpetual futures market in trading volume.BTC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.04, funding rate: 0.0071%.ETH/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.74, funding rate: -0.0037%.SOL/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.25, funding rate: -0.0055%.OM/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.77, funding rate: -0.0122%.XRP/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.17, funding rate: -0.0085%.

data.title: Janover, a US listed company, increases its stake in Solana and reaches a staking cooperation with Kraken
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Janover, a US listed company, has purchased another 80,567 SOL (about 10.5 million US dollars), bringing its total holdings to 163,651.7 SOL (about 21.2 million US dollars). The company, which is controlled by the former Kraken executive team, officially announced a strategic partnership with Kraken. Kraken will entrust part of the Solana staking rights to the validator nodes operated by Janover. Janover plans to change its name to DeFi Development Corporation and will immediately begin staking the newly purchased SOL to generate income. Janover's stock price has risen 1,732% since the implementation of the Solana acquisition strategy. (The Block)

data.title: US Tariffs Could Cost Chip Equipment Makers Over $1 Billion Annually
data.description:
Catenaa, Wednesday, April 16, 2025-New tariffs introduced by the Trump administration could cost US semiconductor equipment makers more than $1 billion a year, according to industry estimates discussed with US lawmakers and officials. 1 The three largest companies in the sector—Applied Materials, Lam Research, and KLA—may each face losses of about $350 million annually due to […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/us-tariffs-could-cost-chip-equipment-makers-over-1-billion-annually

data.title: U.S. and Japan to Discuss Tariff Issues in Upcoming Talks
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that Japanese representatives will visit the United States today to engage in discussions regarding tariff issues. President Trump will participate in the talks, which will also include the U.S. Treasury Secretary and Commerce Secretary. The discussions aim to find solutions, with topics such as military support costs and trade fairness on the agenda.

data.title: A whale repurchased 11.21 million Fartcoins about 8 hours ago, with an average price of $0.89
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, about 8 hours ago, a whale address purchased 11.21 million Fartcoins for about 9.97 million US dollars, with an average price of about 0.89 US dollars. Previously, the address had purchased 13.39 million Fartcoins for 8.15 million US dollars, with an average price of about 0.61 US dollars, and sold them at a price of about 0.86 US dollars, making a profit of about 3.33 million US dollars.

data.title: Trump: Japan will come to the United States today to negotiate on tariffs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said that Japan will come to the United States today to negotiate on tariffs. I will participate in the talks with Japan. The US Treasury Secretary and Commerce Secretary will also attend the meeting. I hope to find a solution. Military support costs and trade fairness are one of the topics of the talks. (Jin Shi)
